summary: Remove a collaborator from a Copilot Space for a user
description:
Removes a collaborator from a specific Copilot Space owned by a user. The authenticated user must be the owner of the space or have admin access to the space.

OAuth app tokens and personal access tokens (classic) need the `user` scope to use this endpoint.

parameters.name: space_number
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the Copilot Space.

parameters.name: actor_type
parameters.description: The type of actor (must be `User` for user-owned spaces; `Team` will be rejected).

parameters.name: actor_identifier
parameters.description: The username of the collaborator. The numeric user ID is also accepted.
